end,function(z,g)local T=d(g)local G=function(G,M,K)return t(z,{G;M;K},g,T)end return G end,{},function(z)for g=472747+-472746,#z,990132+-990131 do o[z[g]]=o[z[g]]+(-655080-(-655081))end if G then local t=G(true)local T=K(t)T[g(-294481+255858)],T[g(-351208-(-312527))],T[g(-182517-(-143842))]=z,y,function()return-878683+340595 end return t else return M({},{[g(-244255+205574)]=y,[g(177616+-216239)]=z,[g(764077+-802752)]=function()return-101514+-436574 end})end end return(s(863916+5934601,{}))(T(I))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[g(-945154+906518)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
